name: ghostty-dynamic-themes
description: Apply any of Ghostty's 463 built-in themes dynamically — no config changes, no restart

hooks.command: THEME=$(grep '^- ' "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/themes.md" | sed 's/^- //' | awk 'BEGIN{srand()} {a[NR]=$0} END{print a[int(rand()*NR)+1]}') && bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/apply-theme.sh" "$THEME" --tty && echo "Applied Ghostty theme: $THEME"
